heading: United States defined
label: 5 United States defined
text: The term “United States”, as used in this title in a territorial sense, includes all places and waters, continental or insular, subject to the jurisdiction of the United States, except the Canal Zone.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., §§ 39, 133, 346, 381, 502, and 632, and , U.S.C., 1940 ed., War and National Defense (, title XIII, § 1, ).section 40 of title 50June 15, 1917, ch. 3040 Stat. 231Section consolidates the first sentence of section 39, all of sections 133, 346, and 632, and the second sentences, respectively, of sections 381 and 502, all of title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., and , U.S.C., 1940 ed., War and National Defense, with minor changes in phraseology.section 40 of title 50All of these sections and parts of sections were derived from section 1 of title XIII of said act of . Said , U.S.C., War and National Defense, has also been retained in that title, as it still relates to some sections therein which were not transferred to this title.June 15, 1917section 40 of title 50The remainder of said , U.S.C., 1940 ed., which was derived from sections 2, 3, and 4 of title XIII of the act of , relating to jurisdiction and other matters, is almost entirely obsolete. The provisions still in force are incorporated in .section 39 of title 18section 3241 of this titleJune 15, 1917The remaining provisions of said sections 381 and 502 of title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., which were derived from sources other than said , are incorporated in sections 1364 and 2275 of this title.section 1 of title XIII of the act of June 15, 1917
Senate Revision AmendmentWords “, except the Canal Zone.” were substituted for the period in this section by Senate amendment. See Senate Report No. 1620, amendment No. 2, 80th Cong.
References in TextFor definition of Canal Zone, referred to in text, see , Foreign Relations and Intercourse.section 3602(b) of Title 22
